IndexPage.title: Professional Brake Pad Manufacturer
IndexPage.subtitle: 20+ years of brake pad manufacturing experience, providing high-quality disc, drum and ceramic brake pad solutions to 50+ countries worldwide
IndexPage.advantage1Desc: Custom manufacturing from drawings/samples, covering 3000+ vehicle models
IndexPage.advantage2Desc: ECE R90, AMECA, ISO/TS16949 certified products
IndexPage.advantage3Desc: 30 days lead time, 5M pcs/month capacity, 7-day rush orders
IndexPage.advantage5Desc: Exported to 50+ countries across Europe, America, Middle East & Africa
IndexPage.advantage6Desc: In-house formula lab, 20+ new formulations annually
IndexPage.factoryDesc: State-of-the-art brake pad manufacturing facility with advanced testing equipment

OeQuery.title: OE Number Lookup
OeQuery.subtitle: Enter your OE number to check availability
OeQuery.supportedDesc: We manufacture this OE number. Request a quote for pricing.
OeQuery.customDesc: This OE number is available for custom development. Contact us for a custom solution.
OeQuery.formatError: Invalid OE number format. Valid format: starts and ends with a letter or digit, may contain letters, digits, spaces, dots (.), hyphens (-), length 4-30 chars. Examples: 04465-06010, GDB1234, 0 986 461 234, 13.0460-2835.2
OeQuery.formatHint: For special OE number format requests, please contact us via the inquiry form
